hero.headline: The Powerful Future of Clean Air
hero.subtext: Fantini Cosmi recuperators and ventilators — engineered in Italy, delivered and installed across Georgia.

categories.sectionSubtitle: Two categories of premium air systems for every home

recuperators.title: Recuperators
recuperators.description: Heat-recovery ventilation. Fresh air in, energy stays in.

about.headline: Design meets power and sustainability
about.body: Alivo is Georgia's trusted partner for premium indoor air quality. We bring Fantini Cosmi's Italian engineering to homes and businesses across the country — pairing world-class technology with honest local expertise.

features.title: The Power of Heat
features.description: High-efficiency heat-recovery cores keep warmth inside while bringing fresh air in — comfort without the energy bill.

features.title: Designed for Comfort
features.description: Whisper-quiet operation, intuitive controls, and a clean, modern look that disappears into your home.

features.title: Sustainable Wind
features.description: Demand-controlled ventilation that uses only the energy it needs — better for your home, better for the planet.

reviews.sectionSubtitle: Real results from real homes across Georgia

blogs.sectionSubtitle: Insights on air quality, ventilation and healthy living

footer.tagline: Premium air purification for Georgian homes.

modal.title: Get in Touch
modal.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
modal.name: Full Name
modal.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

contactPage.title: Let's talk about your home
contactPage.subtitle: Our team will help you choose the right system, prepare a quote and arrange installation. Send us a message or reach out directly.

fantini.headline: Italian Engineering Since 1951
fantini.body: Fantini Cosmi was founded in Milan over 70 years ago and has grown into one of Europe's leading manufacturers of ventilation and climate control systems. Every product combines precision Italian engineering with rigorous quality standards — built to last, built to perform.
